statements.__comment__: DEPRECATED: temporary backward-compatibility migration. Earlier versions scoped DependencyGraphManifest cleanup via HAS_MANIFEST (per-repo); the schema now uses RESOURCE from GitHubOrganization as the sub_resource. Backfill the RESOURCE edge for every existing DependencyGraphManifest reachable from the currently-syncing GitHubOrganization via its repositories. Scoped by $owner_org_id so multi-org refreshes don't redo the full graph each time. Idempotent (MERGE). Remove in v1.0.0.
statements.query: MATCH (o:GitHubOrganization {id: $owner_org_id})-[:RESOURCE]->(r:GitHubRepository)-[:HAS_MANIFEST]->(m:DependencyGraphManifest) MERGE (o)-[rel:RESOURCE]->(m) ON CREATE SET rel.lastupdated = m.lastupdated
